name: IDEXX Veterinary Diagnostics and Laboratory API
what_it_does: IDEXX Laboratories veterinary diagnostics REST API for laboratory result integration, point-of-care analyzer connectivity, and veterinary practice workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage laboratory test order submission and result retrieval for veterinary diagnostic workflow automation, handle in-house analyzer result integration via VetConnect PLUS for point-of-care result automation, access IDEXX Reference Laboratories result delivery for external lab diagnostic automation, retrieve CBC, chemistry, and urinalysis result normalization for clinical data integration automation, manage abnormal flag and critical value notification for patient alert automation, handle SNAP test and rapid diagnostic result capture for point-of-care automation, access diagnostic imaging and digital radiography integration for veterinary imaging workflow, retrieve preventive care reminder and wellness panel result for patient health management automation, manage multi-species reference range application for result interpretation automation, and integrate IDEXX with veterinary practice management software (Cornerstone, AVImark, DVMAX) for end-to-end veterinary clinical workflow.
use_cases: Retrieving lab results from veterinary diagnostic agents
Integrating analyzer data from point-of-care automation agents
Alerting critical values from patient safety agents
Ordering diagnostics from clinical workflow automation agents
not_for: Research and academic laboratory information management
Food safety and agricultural testing laboratories
best_when: A veterinary practice, animal hospital, or veterinary software platform wanting AI agents to automate laboratory result integration, point-of-care analyzer connectivity, critical value notification, and diagnostic workflow within IDEXX's veterinary diagnostic ecosystem.
avoid_when: CRITICAL VALUE NOTIFICATION FOR PATIENT SAFETY: Automated IDEXX laboratory result processing must implement critical value alerting for life-threatening result thresholds (severe anemia, critical electrolyte abnormality, glucose crisis); automated result filing without critical value check creates patient safety risk for missed urgent clinical findings. SPECIES AND BREED REFERENCE RANGE APPLICATION: Automated result interpretation using IDEXX reference ranges must apply species-specific and age-appropriate reference intervals; reference ranges for cats, dogs, exotic species, and age-stratified patients differ significantly; automated interpretation using generic reference ranges creates false positive and false negative clinical alerts. VETERINARY LICENSE RESULT DELIVERY COMPLIANCE: Automated laboratory result delivery via IDEXX must route to licensed veterinarian for clinical interpretation; automated direct patient/owner delivery of laboratory results without veterinarian review creates professional standards violation in most state veterinary practice acts.

auth.notes: IDEXX uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON and HL7. Westbrook, Maine HQ. Founded 1983 by David Shaw. Public (NASDAQ: IDXX). S&P 500. ~$3.7B annual revenue. Global veterinary diagnostics leader. IDEXX Reference Laboratories (largest veterinary lab network), in-house analyzers (Catalyst, ProCyte, SediVue), VetConnect PLUS result platform, Cornerstone PMS. 30,000+ veterinary practices. Competes with Antech (Mars/VCA) for veterinary laboratory services.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-test pricing for laboratory services; VetConnect PLUS included with IDEXX lab relationship
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-test pricing for reference laboratory; analyzer purchase + consumable subscription for in-house testing; VetConnect PLUS API access with active IDEXX lab relationship
pricing.notes: Westbrook ME. NASDAQ: IDXX. Founded 1983. ~$3.7B revenue. Per-test pricing for reference lab. In-house analyzer capital purchase + consumable subscription. VetConnect PLUS API with IDEXX lab account.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; result retrieval and order queries throttled; webhooks for result ready events

known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL VALUE ALERT MANDATORY FOR PATIENT SAFETY: IDEXX result processing must implement species-specific critical value thresholds; automated result filing without critical value check creates patient safety risk; implement critical value alert queue requiring veterinarian acknowledgment before result filing for severe anemia (PCV<15%), severe hypokalemia, severe azotemia, and other critical thresholds

SPECIES-SPECIFIC REFERENCE RANGE REQUIRED: Automated result interpretation must apply species-appropriate reference intervals; IDEXX provides separate reference ranges for dogs, cats, ferrets, rabbits, birds, reptiles, and other species; automated comparison to canine reference ranges for feline results creates false clinical alerts; always include species in reference range lookup

VETCONNECT PLUS REQUIRES ACTIVE IDEXX ACCOUNT: IDEXX VetConnect PLUS API access requires active IDEXX Reference Laboratory account and in-house analyzer service agreement; standalone API access without IDEXX lab relationship is not available; verify IDEXX lab account status before building result integration

HL7 FORMAT FOR PRACTICE MANAGEMENT INTEGRATION: IDEXX reference lab result delivery uses HL7 ORU messages for PMS integration (Cornerstone, AVImark); automated result routing to non-HL7-capable PMS requires HL7 parsing and transformation; verify target PMS HL7 support before building automated result workflow

ANALYZER CONNECTIVITY REQUIRES LOCAL MIDDLEWARE: IDEXX in-house analyzer integration (Catalyst, ProCyte, SediVue) uses VetConnect PLUS local middleware on practice server; automated remote result retrieval requires practice-side middleware installation and configuration; cloud-only integration without local middleware cannot receive in-house analyzer results

RESULT AMENDMENT AND CORRECTION HANDLING: IDEXX may amend laboratory results after initial release (QC review, instrument repeat, critical value call-back); automated result filing must handle amended results and update previously filed records; automated result processing without amendment detection creates outdated clinical record
agent_readiness.security_notes: Veterinary diagnostics. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Animal patient medical records and veterinary laboratory data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Veterinary diagnostics. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Animal patient records and laboratory result data.
